reason: Enabling FIPS mode requires adding the fips module to dracut and regenerating the initramfs with the fips=1 kernel parameter. On an already installed system, this change is unsupported and can render the system unbootable if the initramfs is incorrect or the boot parameter is missing.
estimated_impact: reboot required; filesystems affected; System may become unbootable if dracut regenerated incorrectly; FIPS mode requires kernel boot parameter fips=1; Modifying dracut configuration may break initramfs
